allow: Bash(node -e "const fs=require\(''fs''\);const h=fs.readFileSync\(''public/demo.html'',''utf8''\);console.log\(''demo.html size:'', Math.round\(h.length/1024\)+''KB''\);console.log\(''Has Chart.js CDN:'', h.includes\(''chart.js''\)\);console.log\(''Has ROI calc:'', h.includes\(''calcROI''\)\);console.log\(''Has canvas chat:'', h.includes\(''sendMsg''\)\);console.log\(''Has counters:'', h.includes\(''data-counter''\)\);console.log\(''Has timeline:'', h.includes\(''milestones''\)\);console.log\(''Sections found:'', [''case-studies'',''roi'',''canvas'',''career'',''contact''].filter\(s=>h.includes\(''id=""''+s+''""''\)\).join\('', ''\)\)")
